/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Maze.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Ghost.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/AStar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o -o pacman  -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -lSDL2
